title: Ancap Plans to Launch Natural Hydrogen Bid Round in Uruguay by End of 2025
content: Ancap, the state-run energy company in Uruguay, plans to start a bid round by the end this year for the exploration and development of natural hydrogen. The first offers are expected in 2026. Ancap also plans to launch a bid round for investment in carbon capture, which could be in 2027. This was revealed by the company's representatives at a Houston conference.
author: Analysts Account
